seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation Notice

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day with the company will be [Your Last Date]. I have made the difficult decision to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals. I want to express my sincere gratitude for the support and mentorship you have provided me during my time here.

Over the past few years, I have learned an immense amount from our team and the leadership structure within this organization. Working alongside such dedicated colleagues has been a highlight of my professional journey thus far. I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition of my responsibilities before my departure date. Please let me know how I can best assist in training my replacement or wrapping up my current projects.

I wish the company nothing but continued success and growth in the years ahead. It has been a privilege to contribute to the team's achievements and see the positive impact of our work. Thank you again for the trust you placed in me and for the memorable experiences we have shared together. I look forward to staying in touch and hearing about the company's future endeavors.
